CustomField.description: Links the Contract Diary record to the Portfolio field on the related Contract record. [LOAD:No] [JUSTIFICATION:Contract Diary records are not data-loaded. They are created through a scheduler/flow.] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API:NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API:NA] [COMMENTS:NA]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates where the contract is grouped within the company’s overall portfolio structure.
CustomField.label: Portfolio
